identity.role: 5-term lattice authentication codes with CRT closure

pattern: complete-unformalized work -> formalization in paper-bound space -> Forge

source_work.state_before: complete anti-counterfeit product (lattice engine, security/HMAC, VOA encoder, SDK, API, tests); never formalized, no forge, repo fourpack copy was docs/metadata only

adjudicated_divergence: global mutable sequence counter (thread lock) removed; the sequence is an explicit parameter — Event Law determinism

structural finding: the check digit (DR + sum mod 17) mod 10 is constant 2 for every lattice-valid code; the product counted it as a third independent check — it is not, it only detects corruption of itself

QR codec rewritten: the source packed fixed 3-digit fields while d5 is unbounded (that is what separates batch sequences), so its decoder corrupted any code with a 4+ digit d5 — a latent round-trip bug surfaced by check 9
validated_claims: The digital-root closed form 1+(n-1)%9 matches iterated digit sums on 1..10000.
CRT: {x = 0 mod 17, DR(x) = 2} has the unique solution 119 in [0, 153).
Every valid sum 119 + 153m has digital root 2.
The binding digit closes the lattice for all 6561 digit combinations d1..d4 in 1..9.
Any d5 perturbation by 1..16 breaks the mod-17 identity (detection distance 17 in the d5 coordinate).
The check digit is constant 2 for every lattice-valid code.
Generation is deterministic; 500 distinct sequences give 500 distinct codes.
The QR payload round-trips for every valid code.
Offline verification accepts generated codes; the HMAC gate rejects forged signatures.
honesty_boundary: Forgery-cost claims are NOT bound: lattice closure is public arithmetic — anyone knowing the scheme can mint closed codes. Unforgeability rests entirely on the HMAC layer. Slot-lineage decoding needs its own receipt.
open_obligations: Receipt for slot-lineage decoding (digital-root slot labels).
Promote the product API/SDK as adapters depending on the forge core.
The VOA encoder module (src/voa/encoder.py) was not distilled; assess against EntropyForge/SentinelForge VOA surfaces before adding a third VOA implementation.
notes: Fifth instance of the promotion pattern. With this, the entire Product Fourpack is forge-bound: entropy -> EntropyForge (paper 12), sentinel -> SentinelForge (paper 02), converge -> ConvergeForge (paper 03), authentica -> AuthenticaForge (paper 08). PaneForge-Stick was promoted as a workspace tool earlier the same day.
